data.body: Fix implemented in commit 5df4e90f (branch worktree-20260417-111430). Cannot auto-close due to pre-existing bug 2f20-eb16 (O(N) open-children scan across 16,655 ticket dirs causes SIGURG at ~73s). CLOSE PENDING: manually transition to closed once 2f20-eb16 is resolved. --reason should be: 'Fixed: Removed bare ticket create task example in Step 5 that lacked -d flag. Consolidated into single operative template with -d required. Added structural boundary test to prevent regression.'
